items.title: Zach Edey, who is rehabbing following ankle and elbow surgeries in March, is in Hamilton tonight for Canada's World Cup qualifier against Puerto Rico.
items.author: Eric Koreen
items.body_excerpt:
Zach Edey, who is rehabbing following ankle and elbow surgeries in March, is in Hamilton tonight for Canada's World Cup qualifier against Puerto Rico. 

SGA, NAW, Brooks, Kyshawn George and the Nembs-hard are the Canadian NBAers expected to play.

items.title: A Jaden Bradley fun fact: Went to IMG Academy in Florida. Two of their alums who went on to be NBA draft picks? Toronto's own Zach Edey and Dwight Powell.
items.author: Wolstat
items.body_excerpt: A Jaden Bradley fun fact: Went to IMG Academy in Florida. Two of their alums who went on to be NBA draft picks? Toronto's own Zach Edey and Dwight Powell.
